data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a custom API for proprietary systems, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or tested. The prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to this specific requirement, indicating a clear gap in the evidence regarding the satisfaction of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of validation for the custom API for proprietary systems functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for custom API
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the integration of the custom API.
